name: gatk_liftover_vcf_tool
description: Run GATK LiftoverVcf on a local VCF.

help.summary: Lift the current active VCF from one genome build to another with GATK LiftoverVcf.

modes.name: run
modes.description: Run genome-build conversion on the active VCF source.

options.name: target
options.description: Target genome build for the lifted VCF. ChatGenome currently curates hg38/GRCh38 as the primary target.

options.name: source_build
options.description: Optional source build override if the current build guess is incorrect.

options.name: output_prefix
options.description: Optional prefix for the lifted and rejected VCF outputs.

notes: Uses the active VCF source by default.
Writes both lifted records and rejected records.
